ab: Sndamac namu balay, Walis ka hangan mu.
en: Hello everyone, my name is Walis.

ab: Sndamac su balay, Walis.
Sndamac namu balay kana, Takun ka hangan mu.
en: Hello everyone, my name is Takun.

ab: Takun, sndamac su malay.
Sndamac su balay, Pedang ku ka yaku.
Sndamac su balay Pedang, yaku pa hay Buwih ka hangan mu.
Sndamac su balay, Soruk ka hangan mu.
Soruk, sndamac su balay, Bakan ku ka yaku.
Ima su ka isu?
Bubu ku na Harung, Buwih ka hangan mu.
Ima su ka isu?
Swayi qridin ku na Watan ka yaku, Bakan ka hangan mu.
ch: B:我是Watan的妹妹，我的名字是Bakan。
en: I am Watan’s sister. My name is Bakan.

ab: Ima ka hiya?
Mptusa mu ka hiya, Harung ka hangan niya.
Ima ka sediq way?
Qbsuran mu snaw ka hiya, Qaqung ka hangan na.
Dakis ka hiya hu?
Iyaq, Dakis ka hiya.
Basaw su ka isu hu?
Uxay, Pihu ku ka yaku.
Ima ka Tuday?
Yaku ka Tuday.
Ima ka Soruk?
Dangi mu ka Soruk.
Ima hangan niya ka qbsuran su qridin?
en: What is your elder sister’s name?

ab: Hangan qbsuran mu qridin u Sama.
en: My elder sister’s name is Sama.

ab: Ima ka hangan swayi su qridin?
en: What is your younger sister’s name?

ab: Hangan swayi mu qridin pa Robaw.
en: My younger sister’s name is Robaw.

ab: Klaun su ka hangan niya hu?
Watan ka hangan niya.
Khnu kngkawas na kawas ni ka qbsuran su snaw da?
en: How old is your elder brother?

ab: Maxal rima kngkawas na kawas ni ka hiya da.
Piya kngkawas kawas ni ka swayi su snaw da?
en: How old is your younger brother?

ab: rima kngkawas na kawas ni ka hiya da.
Niqan sapah pyasan ka alang namu hu?
en: Do you have schools in your community?

ab: Niqan.
Wa su muyas sapah pyasan alang ka isu hu?
ch: A:你在部落的學校讀書嗎?
en: Do you study in your tribe’s school?

ab: Iyaq, wa ku muyas sapah pyasan alang ka yaku, mntna nami so bay kingal tnsapah ka yami.
ch: B:是的，我在學校讀書我們像一家人。
en: Yes, we are like family while we are studying at school.
